summary: The diff implements all four requirements reasonably well. REQ-1 (duration field), REQ-2 (AI calorie estimation), REQ-3 (step tracking), and REQ-4 (Calories Burned stat card) are all addressed. Minor gaps exist around per-workout calorie display in FitnessAISuggestions and the weekly total visibility, but the core implementations are present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each workout entry shows an AI-calculated estimated calories burned value based on exercise type and duration
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows FitnessAISuggestions.tsx imports estimateCaloriesBurned and totalCaloriesBurned and calculates totalBurnedToday, but the truncated content does not confirm that each individual workout entry displays its per-workout calorie estimate. The per-workout calorie display AC is not clearly evidenced.

hallucinated_features.description: Live AI calorie preview in WorkoutLogForm before submission
hallucinated_features.reason: WorkoutLogForm shows a real-time calorie preview (previewCalories) while the user is filling in the form. This was not requested — the build request only asked for calorie estimates on logged workouts, not a live preview during form entry.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module as a separate backend file (backend/migration.mo)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraints state all backend logic must remain in the single main actor in backend/main.mo. A separate migration.mo module was created outside of main.mo, violating this constraint.
